mapper.select: SELECT state_id as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.checkout_flat GROUP BY state_id

SELECT checkout_id as "id", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", customer_email as "customerEmail", customer_phone as "customerPhone", cart_id as "cartId", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", subtotal as "subtotal", tax_amount as "taxAmount", shipping_amount as "shippingAmount", discount_amount as "discountAmount", total as "total", currency as "currency", coupon_codes as "couponCodes", item_count as "itemCount", payment_method as "paymentMethod", shipping_address as "shippingAddress", shipping_city as "shippingCity", shipping_state as "shippingState", shipping_pincode as "shippingPincode", billing_address as "billingAddress", order_id as "orderId", created_at as "createdAt", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.checkout_flat WHERE checkout_id = #{id}
